name: Locus Payment Agent
description: Agent that pays for APIs, services, and tasks through Locus — constrained by AgentScope policy. Budget, categories, and memo requirements enforced before any payment executes.

contractWhitelist.name: Locus Payment API
contractWhitelist.description: USDC transfer via Locus smart wallet on Base

useCases: Agent pays for web scraping API calls (Firecrawl via Locus wrapped APIs)
Agent pays for private AI inference (Venice via Locus)
Agent transfers USDC to contractors for completed tasks
Agent processes checkout payments for SaaS subscriptions
All payments logged with reasoning — full audit trail
